variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of operating overhead component rows, and the visible SG&A D&A rows appear as separate line items above operating profit rather than clearly as sub-components embedded within those selected rows. 'Amortization in SGA' is not chosen because it has no visible values and does not function as a usable summary row in the excerpt. Included the R&D amortization row under the special rule because XRD is empty and no separate R&D expense row is visible.
